Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30076 0 0}Let's see here... My name is Metis... And my nickname...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}Sister, do I have a nickname?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30067 0 0}Oh, some of your friends call me that. I see, so it counts as a nickname...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30128 0 0}That's true! And there's nothing more special than your own name.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30059 0 0}Well, if you don't know, then I doubt anyone else would, either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30003 0 0}Hm, this next section is about... my role model.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}My favorite thing? Also my sister. And so is this one... And this one, and...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Well, I guess things just happen to turn out that way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}So... How far did you get? Are you already done?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30111 0 0}Okay! I'll be patient and wait right here for you to finish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30027 0 0}Of course you do! That's the whole point of this {f 4 4 0 37 1 16789}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Also... I was hoping we could exchange them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}And that does it for the {f 4 4 0 37 1 16789} exchange. Mission success![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}I'm so happy we were able to carry out our own exchange...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30110 0 0}I get this strange feeling whenever I receive something from you, Sister...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}Like a sense of fulfillment whenever you gift me things or trust me with something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}It's hard to articulate it effectively, but I feel as if... As if my chest is swelling up—to the point it might just burst.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Then you must have someone in your life who's just as important to you as you are to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}And that thought makes my chest feel even more full... It's overwhelming.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30050 0 0}That's okay. I'm actually not too sure what it all means, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30056 0 0}Hm... I don't really know, but whatever it is, I doubt it's something bad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}After all, it feels so pleasant and warm... So it has to be good, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Metis seems to be deeply[n]reflecting on her feelings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 11 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 11 25 25}I'll always cherish it and keep it safe. I hope you feel the same way with mine.[n]{f 1 1}
